Common_Genes: UAXS (UDP-apiose/UDP-xylose synthase from Arabidopsis thaliana; used as a tool enzyme to supply UDP-apiose in vitro and in vivo; co-expressed with GuApiGT in tobacco for de novo biosynthesis)
Pathway_Genes: GuApiGT (UGT79B74; apiosyltransferase from Glycyrrhiza uralensis; catalyzes 2''-O-apiosylation of flavonoid glycosides with strict UDP-apiose selectivity; crystal structure solved at 2.2 Å; RLGSDH motif identified as key sugar-binding determinant; accepts 37 glycoside substrates; conversion rates ≥80% for 14 substrates; Km = 2.59 µmol/L, kcat = 0.11 s⁻¹ for isoliquiritin)

Sb3GT1 (flavonoid 3-O-glycosyltransferase; crystal structure solved at 1.9 Å in complex with UDP; FFGDQ motif mapped to RLGSDH of GuApiGT; mutants 375S/Q377H, F372R/Q376H, F372R/375S/Q377H gained apiosylation activity on kaempferol)
PtApiGT (apiosyltransferase from Pueraria thomsonii; identified via RLGSDH motif; confirmed apiosylation activity by enzyme catalysis)
SsApiGT (apiosyltransferase from Spatholobus suberectus; identified via RLGSDH motif; confirmed apiosylation activity by enzyme catalysis)
GgApiGT (apiosyltransferase from Glycyrrhiza glabra; identified via RLGSDH motif; confirmed apiosylation activity by enzyme catalysis)
GiApiGT (apiosyltransferase from Glycyrrhiza inflata; identified via RLGSDH motif; confirmed apiosylation activity by enzyme catalysis)

GuGT53 (UGT88E28; flavonoid glucosyltransferase from G. uralensis; regio-selectively catalyzes 4'/4-O-glucosylation of liquiritigenin and isoliquiritigenin to produce liquiritin and isoliquiritin; used in de novo biosynthesis module 3)
GuGT14 (flavonoid glucosyltransferase from G. uralensis; used in glycosyltransferase module but showed poor regio-selectivity generating byproduct 7a)
GuCHS (chalcone synthase from G. uralensis; used as bait gene for co-expression analysis and in module 1 for de novo biosynthesis of flavonoid aglycones)
GuCHR (chalcone reductase from G. uralensis; used as bait gene for co-expression analysis and in module 1 for de novo biosynthesis of isoliquiritigenin)
GuCHI (chalcone isomerase from G. uralensis; used in module 1 to replace AtCHI for production of liquiritin apioside)
AtPAL (phenylalanine ammonia-lyase from Arabidopsis thaliana; used in module 1 for de novo biosynthesis)
AtC4H (cinnamate 4-hydroxylase from Arabidopsis thaliana; used in module 1 for de novo biosynthesis)
At4CL (4-coumarate-CoA ligase from Arabidopsis thaliana; used in module 1 for de novo biosynthesis)
AtCHS (chalcone synthase from Arabidopsis thaliana; used in module 1 for de novo biosynthesis)
Title: Insights into the missing apiosylation step in flavonoid apiosides biosynthesis of Leguminosae plants
